CustomField.formula:
IF(Procurement_Completion__c *200<150, IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", "red", 15, Procurement_Completion__c *200 )&LEFT(TEXT(Procurement_Completion__c *100),5)+"%",
IF(Procurement_Completion__c *200 < 200, IMAGE("/img/samples/color_yellow.gif", "yellow", 15,Procurement_Completion__c *200 ) & LEFT(TEXT(Procurement_Completion__c *100),5)+"%",
IMAGE("/img/samples/color_green.gif", "green", 15, Procurement_Completion__c *200 ) &LEFT(TEXT(Procurement_Completion__c *100),5)+"%" ))
CustomField.label: Procurement Information Completion Rate
